bullets: Conducting component selection, schematic design, and layout review to meet all constraints
Working with the electronics team to establish efficient communication between the flight computer and the ground station
Working within the flight computer team to design, create, and fully test the flight computer prior to launch
Intern on the Controller scrum team that writes industry-standard software for Emerson's DeltaV controllers
Migrated controller build environment from Windows to Linux using containerization (Docker) in WSL
Improved controller build times by 82.5%, reducing build times from ~40 minutes to ~7 minutes
Architecting the electronics bay and the ground station
Conducting schematic and PCB layout reviews, ensuring the team stays on track and complies with competition constraints
Working with the hardware design team to define physical constraints for the electronics bay
Managing task delegation, timelines, and budget for the team
